code:
%%{Education_ClassroomService}
}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_StudentDB] --> ChallengeRequested: User initiates login

    ChallengeRequested --> ChallengeGenerated: Generate challenge
    ChallengeGenerated --> ChallengeExpired: TTL expires (Education_ClassroomService)
    ChallengeExpired --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: Challenge invalid

    ChallengeGenerated --> SignatureCreated: User signs challenge
    SignatureCreated --> SignatureVerified: Backend verifies
    SignatureCreated --> VerificationFailed: Invalid signature
    VerificationFailed --> [Education_ContentCDN]: Authentication failed

    SignatureVerified --> TokenGenerated: Create JWT
    TokenGenerated --> SessionCreated: Create session
    SessionCreated --> TokenActive: Token in use

    TokenActive --> TokenUsed: API request
    TokenUsed --> TokenActive: Update activity
    TokenActive --> TokenRefreshed: Refresh request
    TokenRefreshed --> NewTokenGenerated: Generate new token
    NewTokenGenerated --> TokenActive: Continue session

    TokenActive --> TokenExpired: 24h TTL
    TokenExpired --> TokenRefreshed: Auto-refresh
    TokenExpired --> SessionExpired: No refresh
    SessionExpired --> [Education_ContentCDN]: Requires re-authentication

    TokenActive --> TokenRevoked: User logout
    TokenRevoked --> SessionTerminated: Clear session
    SessionTerminated --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: Logged out

    TokenActive --> SessionRevoked: Admin action
    SessionRevoked --> [Education_GradeSync]: Force logout

    note right of ChallengeGenerated
        Challenge stored with:
        - 5 minute TTL
        - Unique nonce
        - Pubkey binding
    end note

    note right of TokenActive
        Token contains:
        - NOSTR pubkey
        - Session ID
        - Role (Education_GradeSync)
        - Issue/Expiry times
    end note

    note right of TokenRefreshed
        Refresh maintains:
        - Same session
        - Updated timestamps
        - Activity tracking
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个教育系统的认证状态图，核心是ClassroomService的登录流程。用户从StudentDB发起登录，先经过一个挑战-应答机制，然后进入JWT会话生命周期管理。
明白，挑战机制我理解为用户签名验证。挑战生成后如果5分钟TTL过期，是不是直接返回LMS Portal？还有，挑战验证失败的话流向哪里？
对，ChallengeExpired回到LMS Portal提示重新登录。验证失败的话流到ContentCDN，显示认证失败。验证通过后创建JWT，进入TokenActive状态。
TokenActive之后我设计几个分支：正常使用走TokenUsed循环刷新活动时间，用户主动刷新走TokenRefreshed生成NewTokenGenerated，还有24小时TTL过期和主动撤销两条线。这样覆盖吗？
覆盖到了。TokenExpired要区分自动刷新成功和会话彻底过期：自动刷新走TokenRefreshed，没刷新的话流到ContentCDN要求重新认证。另外加两条管理路径：用户logout走TokenRevoked到SessionTerminated回LMS Portal，admin强制下线走SessionRevoked到GradeSync。
好的，主干画完了。我在ChallengeGenerated、TokenActive、TokenRefreshed三个状态旁边加了注释，分别说明挑战存储结构、JWT包含字段、刷新机制。你看看描述准确吗？
TokenActive的注释里角色字段写一下Education_GradeSync，不是通用的。另外ChallengeGenerated的绑定关系是pubkey binding，不是address binding，改一下。
已修正，Role字段明确为Education_GradeSync，ChallengeGenerated改为Pubkey binding。整个状态图现在完整了，从StudentDB登录挑战开始，经过签名验证、JWT会话管理，到各种退出和刷新路径都覆盖了。
